user_query: I need to create personalized meal plans for my clients with nutritional analysis and vaccination guidelines.

TaskList.description: Collect information on various food items to analyze their nutritional content.
Perform nutritional analysis on the collected food items to determine their macronutrient and micronutrient content.
Gather guidelines for vaccinations relevant to overall health and nutrition.
Compile the nutritional analysis results with vaccination guidelines into a comprehensive meal plan.
